resources.title: Native Plant Adaptation in Aotearoa Ecosystems - Year 9 Science
resources.subject: Science
resources.description: Native plants have evolved sophisticated adaptations through deep relationships with their environment, embodying principles of whakapapa (genealogy) and whanaungatanga (relationships) that sustain entire ecosystems.
